title: Vector Similarity Metrics
code:
import numpy as np

def run_practice():
    u = np.array([1, 1, 0])
    v = np.array([0, 1, 1])
    sim = np.dot(u, v) / (np.linalg.norm(u) * np.linalg.norm(v))
    assert np.allclose(sim, 0.5)
    print('[PASS] Cosine calculation matches expectation.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
